top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
WHERE e.type != 'fundraiser'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_member) > 20;

HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_member) > 20;

WHERE e.type <> 'fundraiser'
GROUP BY e.event_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 20;

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
WHERE e.type != 'fundraiser'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_member) > 20;
